headline: Mark Cuban Refuses To 'Rip On' TrumpRx, Lauds It For Saving 'A Lot Of ' Patients' Money
summary: Mark Cuban, billionaire entrepreneur and CEO of Costplusdrugs.com, praised TrumpRx, a prescription drug platform launched by President Donald Trump, for its efforts in reducing the cost of certain medications for patients.
